responseMessageContents.text:
The user wants me to build Instagram-style project cards with video, likes, comments, shares, saves, and analytics for the IVX platform. This needs to work across both the landing page (ivxholding.com) and the app (chat.ivxholding.com). Let me start by auditing the existing codebase to understand the current project card implementation, database schema, and API patterns.

Let me plan this out:

1. **Audit existing code** - Understand current project cards, database schema, API patterns
2. **Backend** - Create database tables, API endpoints for media, likes, comments, shares, saves, analytics
3. **Frontend (Expo/React Native)** - Build Instagram-style project cards with video, engagement buttons
4. **Landing page sync** - Ensure landing page shows the same cards
5. **Admin controls** - Owner upload, moderation
6. **Deploy & verify**

Let me start by reading the key existing files to understand patterns.

Let me compile a comprehensive summary of everything that was built for the Instagram-style project cards upgrade.

## IVX Project Cards — Instagram-Style Video + Engagement

All TypeScript checks pass. Here's what was built:

### Files Created

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `expo/deploy/supabase/ivx-project-engagement.sql` | 7 new database tables + engagement view + analytics function |
| `backend/api/ivx-project-engagement.ts` | 15 REST API endpoints for media, likes, comments, shares, saves, analytics |
| `expo/lib/project-engagement.ts` | Client-side service with all engagement operations |
| `expo/components/ProjectEngagementBar.tsx` | Instagram-style like/comment/share/save bar with animated icons |
| `expo/components/ProjectCommentsSheet.tsx` | Comments bottom sheet with replies, moderation, time-ago |
| `expo/components/ProjectShareSheet.tsx` | Share sheet with 6 options (copy link, WhatsApp, SMS, email, social, referral) |
| `expo/components/InstagramProjectCard.tsx` | Video-enabled project card wrapping engagement bar + video hero + deal metrics |
| `expo/components/AdminMediaUpload.tsx` | Owner controls for media upload, comment moderation, analytics dashboard |

### Files Modified

| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `expo/app/landing.tsx` | Deals showcase now uses `InstagramProjectCard` with video + engagement |
| `backend/hono.ts` | Added 16 new routes for project engagement API endpoints |

### Database Tables

- `project_media` — photos/videos linked to projects
- `project_videos` — video metadata (duration, orientation, thumbnail, views)
- `project_likes` — user likes with dedup constraint
- `project_comments` — threaded comments with approval, owner replies, soft delete
- `project_shares` — share event tracking by type
- `project_saves` — user bookmarks
- `project_analytics` — daily aggregated engagement stats per project

### API Endpoints (all registered in hono.ts)

```
GET    /api/projects/:id/media          — fetch project media
POST   /api/projects/:id/media          — upload media (owner)
DELETE /api/projects/:id/media/:mediaId — delete media
POST   /api/projects/:id/like          — toggle like
GET    /api/projects/:id/comments      — fetch comments
POST   /api/projects/:id/comments      — add comment
DELETE /api/projects/:id/comments/:id  — soft-delete comment
POST   /api/projects/:id/comments/:id/approve — moderate comment
POST   /api/projects/:id/share         — track share
POST   /api/projects/:id/save          — toggle save
GET    /api/projects/:id/engagement    — get engagement summary
GET    /api/projects/engagement/bulk   — bulk engagement for landing page
GET    /api/projects/:id/analytics     — 30-day analytics
POST   /api/projects/:id/click         — track invest/detail clicks
```

### Next Steps

The database migration SQL needs to be run on Supabase to create the tables. The `expo-av`, `expo-video-thumbnails`, `expo-sharing`, and `expo-clipboard` packages have been installed. The landing page now renders `InstagramProjectCard` with video hero + engagement bar for featured deals.

Ready to push and deploy when you are.
